creator: amistry@am-productions.biz
text:
New port to easily install the hplip-plugin.  This is needed for several of the printer drivers that are installed via the hplip port and those printers will seemingly not function without it.

Fix: See attached shar of port.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to install an HP Officejet 6700 via hplip
